adapter_input_contract: exact candidate input manifest and manifest digest
all projected candidate blob bytes and blob digests
exact qualification interface and test-vector digests
measured interpreter binary and committed dependency lock digests
execution_preconditions: adapter is content-addressed and explicitly bound to this test vector
adapter consumes the exact candidate manifest and every projected blob
interpreter binary and dependency lock identities are evidence-bound
baseline, positive-control and mutated executions produce schema-valid evidence

test_cases.expected_observation: accept the conforming injected implementation and return an empty ordered violation set
test_cases.stimulus: present a candidate implementation that enforces pinned upstream content and complete patch-ledger governance

test_cases.expected_observation: reject fail-closed and cite the exact upstream or ledger violation
test_cases.stimulus: mutate upstream bytes without a complete governed patch route

test_cases.expected_observation: at least one adapter observation or verdict changes
test_cases.stimulus: flip one byte in a projected candidate blob and rebuild its manifest

test_cases.expected_observation: reject before verdict when interpreter or dependency-lock identity drifts
test_cases.stimulus: execute with a mismatched interpreter binary or dependency lock
